name: io.github.sudohnim/eidolon
description: Privacy-first OSINT scanner: breaches, credentials, Shodan, username sweep. Scored PDF report.

tools.name: scan_target
tools.description: Start an async OSINT scan for an email or username. Returns scan_id immediately.

tools.name: scan_status
tools.description: Poll the status of a running scan by scan_id.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Retrieve the full markdown report for a completed scan.

tools.name: list_scans
tools.description: List all scans with their status.

tools.name: reveal_credentials
tools.description: Show leaked credentials found for the scanned target.

OLLAMA_HOST.description: Ollama base URL for local LLM summarization (default: http://localhost:11434)
